title: Create node group
command: aws eks create-nodegroup --cluster-name production-cluster --nodegroup-name app-nodes --node-role arn:aws:iam::123456789:role/EKSNodeRole --subnets subnet-xxx subnet-yyy --scaling-config minSize=2,maxSize=10,desiredSize=3 --instance-types t3.medium
description: Create managed node group with autoscaling.
